---
title: "Homework 3 193DS"
author: "Valentina Caro"
date: "03-05-2026"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  message: false 
  warning: false
---

## Set Up

```{r}
#| label: reading in packages + data

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(scales)
library(ggeffects)
library(MuMIn)

salinity <- read_xlsx(
  here(
    "data",
    "salinity-pickleweed.csv"
  ))

```
